violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

Working containers of chocolate chips are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The door to the outside, located at the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

The walk-in cooler was observed not in good repair. At the time of Opening Inspection, the Walk-in Cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 78 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the Owner, Refrigeration technician was called. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
